primer-impacto.Banner-alt: Grandland offices, where Primer Impacto is located
primer-impacto.Overview: Primer Impacto is a retail marketing and digital solutions company based in Barcelona. They provide innovative retail experiences and data-driven marketing services for leading brands across Spain, helping companies optimize their digital presence and customer engagement.

responsibilities.0: Developed and maintained the internal operational web platform used daily by all business areas
responsibilities.1: Designed and implemented data integrations with external clients, ensuring reliability and performance
responsibilities.2: Managed CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure to ensure continuous delivery
responsibilities.3: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful new features
responsibilities.4: Analyzed and reported security vulnerabilities, ensuring platform compliance

decathlon.Overview: Decathlon is one of the world's largest sports goods retailers, operating in over 60 countries. Their Spanish e-commerce team delivers high-performance digital shopping experiences while contributing to the international UI component library shared across markets.

responsibilities.0: Developed and shipped new features for the Spanish e-commerce product pages and checkout flows
responsibilities.1: Contributed to the international Decathlon UI component library alongside the French team
responsibilities.2: Co-led code quality initiatives and defined the frontend testing strategy
responsibilities.3: Monitored and improved Core Web Vitals performance metrics
responsibilities.4: Reviewed pull requests and mentored junior developers

skills.1: UI Library: Storybook, Design Tokens, CSS Modules
skills.3: Performance: Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse, Web Perf
